blast.name: Blast
blast.desc_long: 3" radius area of effect. Roll separately for each model in area. Cover applies normally.

brutal_blast.name: Brutal Blast
brutal_blast.desc_long: 6" radius area of effect. Roll separately for each model in area. Cover applies normally.

savage_blast.name: Savage Blast
savage_blast.desc_long: 9" radius area of effect. Roll separately for each model in area. Cover applies normally.

blinding.name: Blinding
blinding.desc_long: On hit: target is Blinded until end of its next activation. While Blinded: cannot make ranged attacks, -2 dice on melee attacks, cannot use abilities requiring line of sight, move at half speed. An adjacent ally may use an action to clean ink/flash from a Blinded unit (removes Blinded status). Rain or water terrain immediately removes Blinded.

grapple.name: Grapple
grapple.desc_long: On hit, pull target 3" toward this unit. Target may not move next activation.

rending.name: Rending
rending.desc_long: If this attack exceeds Defense by 2 or more, it deals +1 additional damage.

ignores_cover.name: Ignores Cover
ignores_cover.desc_long: Attacks from this weapon ignore cover bonuses to Defense.

unstable.name: Unstable
unstable.desc_long: On a Critical Failure, this weapon deals 1 damage to the attacker.

pinning_shot.name: Pinning Shot
pinning_shot.desc_long: Target hit may not move next activation.

quake.name: Quake
quake.desc_long: All models within 6" must pass Quality test or become Pinned.

rapid_fire.name: Rapid Fire
rapid_fire.desc_long: May split attack dice between multiple targets within range. Used by Jager marksmen.

sonic.name: Sonic
sonic.desc_long: Ignores Heavy Armor bonus. Ignores cover bonuses to Defense. If at least 1 damage dealt, target tests Morale.

shatter.name: Shatter
shatter.desc_long: If this attack deals damage, the target suffers -1 Defense until the end of its next activation.

sunder.name: Sunder
sunder.desc_long: If this weapon deals damage, the target suffers -1 Defense for the rest of the game. This effect does not stack.

filthy.name: Filthy
filthy.desc_long: If this attack hits (even if no damage is dealt), the target rolls -1 die on its next action.

melee.name: Melee
melee.desc_long: Can be used in close combat. Does not require Line of Sight.

breach.name: Breach
breach.desc_long: Gain +1 Quality die when attempting Interact actions on locked or sealed objectives.
